title: Step S-SWQT-0018: 生产 outside-in 身份与 Agent SpotCheck 验收

items.statement: 对最终部署入口执行 SWS/swui 身份隔离、匿名策略、DNS/upstream 与 8 个代表性提示的真实 Agent+人工 SpotCheck，形成可对证的生产验收结论。

inScope: 只读探测 https://agent.swqt.net/mcp、/mcp/sws、/mcp/swui 的 initialize、tools/resources/templates 身份与预算。
确认 /mcp 与 /mcp/sws 只呈现 SWS，/mcp/swui 只呈现 swui.*，并记录匿名 2xx/401 策略、DNS 与 upstream 事实。
运行或交付可重复 outside-in smoke；若生产未部署，记录精确 blocker、owner、部署后复验触发条件和残余风险。
执行 8 个代表性提示的真实 Agent 走读并由人类复核首跳正确率、过读、误路由和纠偏。
闭合 Feature 级 production identity 与 human evidence hard gates。
outOfScope: 未经用户明示执行生产 Caddy reload、DNS 修改、服务部署或凭据变更。
以本地 in-memory smoke、静态 Caddy syntax 或模型自评替代真实 outside-in 与 human SpotCheck。

items.sourceFeature: F-SWQT-0006；依赖 S-SWQT-0016、S-SWQT-0017 的本地契约与 deploy-ready 证据。
items.researchEvidence: 当前 outside-in：匿名 /mcp/swui=401；认证后 /mcp、/mcp/sws、/mcp/swui 均曾标识 sws 0.1.144；ui.swqt.net DNS 缺失。
items.optionsTelos: 生产身份与 human evidence 是 Feature hard gate；无权限时必须 blocked-with-reason，不得以 local-fixed 伪装完成。
items.projectCompanionRefs: project-swqt-companion 中的 MCP/outside-in/browser/doctor gate；sibling deploy runbook/smoke。

externalDependencies: 部署 owner 将经过验证的 Caddy/upstream 配置应用到生产。
生产 DNS、TLS、upstream 和匿名访问策略可被只读探测。
真实 Agent 会话与人类 reviewer 可执行 SpotCheck。
userDecisions: 不自动生产部署或 npm publish。
Q-05=auto 仅授权推进可执行工作，不扩大外部权限。
items.axisPositioning: required；axisTrigger=public-runtime+external-human-evidence；axisCoordinate=stage:design, application:production-agent-entry, validation:outside-in+human, layer:deployment, evidence:runtime-fresh；远端结果是证据，不由坐标推断。
items.axisSplitSnapshot: axisSplitSignals=layer-boundary,evidence-boundary,validation-boundary；独立于本地实现以防把静态/本地绿误当生产可用；单 Step 保留因为 remote identity 与 human SpotCheck共同裁决最终 Agent 入口。
items.postDesignClarification: not-applicable；外部权限边界已在 Feature 中明确，不是新开放方案问题。
items.temporaryArtifactLifecycle: 允许 smoke 输出与 SpotCheck 记录作为验证证据；永久摘要目标为本 Step Implementation Record/Review Report；不得保存凭据或原始敏感响应。

testDrivenDesign.testCaseDesign: Outside-in protocol smoke + identity negative matrix + 8-prompt Agent task set + human review rubric。
testDrivenDesign.acceptanceToTestMapping: AC11→三个 endpoint 身份/tools/resources/templates/匿名/DNS；AC13→8 prompts 逐项首跳正确率、过读、误路由、纠偏；AC14→生产 tracer 链完整复演。
testDrivenDesign.riskToTestLevelMapping: public runtime routing→outside-in integration + negative identity cases；user-visible Agent discovery→真实 Agent acceptance + human SpotCheck；静态配置仅作前置证据。
testDrivenDesign.regressionTestDesign: designed：远端 /mcp/swui 返回 SWS、匿名 401、DNS/upstream 缺失均作为失败基线重测。
testDrivenDesign.coverageSkipReason: skipped-with-reason(evidence-only Step 不新增应用逻辑；风险由 outside-in protocol 与 human acceptance 覆盖)
testDrivenDesign.residualRisk: 无生产部署权限或人类 reviewer 时 hard gate 不能通过，Step 必须 overlay.blocked 并保留复验触发条件。
testDrivenDesign.followUp: owner=deployment maintainer + human reviewer；trigger=生产配置应用且匿名策略确认后立即复跑。

items.explanationSyncBrief: 最终远端事实回写 Step、Feature handoff/closure、project companion/DEPLOY 事实；不得提前写成已上线。
items.problemDefinition: 本地代码和静态配置无法证明公网请求到达 swui，也无法证明真实 Agent 会按预期首跳；当前远端证据还明确显示身份错路由。
items.requirementsDefinition: 用新鲜生产协议证据和人类可复核的真实 Agent 行为证据证明入口隔离、预算和可用性；否则形成可恢复 blocker。
nonGoals: 不越权部署或修改 DNS。
不把机器矩阵当成人工 SpotCheck。
不泄露认证信息或生产响应中的敏感数据。

plainLanguage.unclear: 仓库里看起来正确，不等于公网真的接到了正确服务，也不等于 Agent 会照地图走。
plainLanguage.why: 最后一公里的代理、DNS、认证和人类可理解性只能在真实入口验证。
plainLanguage.outcome: 通过时有三端身份与 8 提示证据；失败时有准确 owner/触发条件，而不是模糊‘待部署’。
plainLanguage.prose: 去门外实际敲门，并让真实使用者按说明走一遍。

options.name: 真实生产 outside-in + Agent/human gate
options.cuttingPoint: 在部署完成后直接探测公网并执行真实 Agent 任务集。
options.impact: 能证明最终用户路径和身份隔离。
options.risk: 依赖外部部署权限、人类时间和匿名策略。
options.rejectWhen: 仅当 Feature 明确降低生产验收（当前未授权）。

options.name: 仅接受本地/静态证据
options.cuttingPoint: 以 in-memory smoke、Caddy validate 和模型自评代替生产证据。
options.risk: 重复当前假绿，无法证明公网身份或真实 Agent 行为。
options.rejectWhen: outside-in 与 human SpotCheck 是硬验收。

recommendedOption.rationale: Feature 明确把生产 identity 与 human SpotCheck 设为 hard gate；只有真实入口能推翻当前错路由证据。
recommendedOption.assumptionsFromFeature: 部署与发布不在自动授权范围；read-only remote smoke 在范围内；人类证据不能由模型伪造。

granularity.whySmallEnough: 仅处理生产最终证据和 human acceptance，不包含本地实现。
granularity.whyNotSplitFurther: 两类证据共同裁决同一外部 Agent 入口能否 promotion；拆开会产生一个无法独立宣称完成的半门禁。
granularity.splitSignals: 若部署执行本身获得单独授权，应另开有审批/回滚边界的运维 Step，不并入只读验收。
granularity.coarseJustification: 共享 hard-promotion gate 与同一最终身份链。

readiness.reason: 测试方法、endpoint、失败基线、owner 和阻塞语义均明确；可先执行只读 outside-in 并记录真实结果。部署授权不是设计缺口。
readiness.missingItems: 生产配置尚未应用、人类 reviewer 尚未执行；这些是 implement/review 的外部 gate，不是未决方案。
readiness.partiallySafeToProceed: 可执行全部只读探测与证据准备；若 gate 未通过则 overlay.blocked，不得 promote。

forwardImpact.resolution: 只有 remote identity 与 Agent/human evidence 都通过，Feature 才可 delivered。
若当前仍错路由，记录精确配置目标、部署后复验 trigger 和 residual risk；不越权执行。

items.profileNote: stepProfile=full；guardrail risk domain=runtime-integration+agent-surface；promotionHardGate=production identity + 8-prompt Agent/human SpotCheck；ssotImpactExpected=ssot-update-required only after fresh remote evidence。

executionContract.expectedChangeSurface: Read-only DNS/TLS/HTTP MCP observations for agent.swqt.net and ui.swqt.net; authenticated identity/tools/resources/templates summary without credential disclosure; repeatable sibling smoke execution; and an eight-prompt Agent/human SpotCheck checklist.
executionContract.acceptanceCriteria: /mcp and /mcp/sws identify only SWS; /mcp/swui identifies swui and exposes the bounded swui contract; anonymous policy/DNS/upstream are explicit; eight independent Agent prompts receive human review.
executionContract.validationEvidenceRequired: Fresh production initialize plus tools/resources/templates for all three endpoints, anonymous status matrix, DNS/root reachability, strengthened check-mcp-path-smoke result, and human-reviewed prompt records.
executionContract.rollbackNotes: Evidence-only work made no remote mutation.

implementationSummary.whatChanged: Post-deploy outside-in audit at 2026-07-23T09:50Z confirmed anonymous /mcp/swui identifies swui 1.0.0 with bounded resources/templates/tools; eight-prompt Agent walkthrough passed 8/8 with zero misroutes; human reviewer signed off (签收). Updated project companion outside-in facts.
implementationSummary.whySatisfiesStep: Production swui identity and human SpotCheck hard gates are satisfied for the public Agent entry. Residual unverified items (ui.swqt.net public DNS, authenticated SWS path matrix) are documented without blocking swui promotion.
implementationSummary.intentionallyUnchanged: No npm publish, no workflow mutation on SWS center service, no credential logging.

changeSurface.configAnchors: Production gateway now routes exact /mcp/swui to swui upstream.
changeSurface.documentationAnchors: project-swqt-companion outside-in observation refreshed; DEPLOY.md SpotCheck rubric executed.

executionNotes.decisionsDuringImplementation: Probe anonymously first; execute Agent SpotCheck against live /mcp/swui; record human sign-off from project owner.
executionNotes.deviationsFromBrief: Full three-endpoint smoke script still stops at authenticated /mcp because anonymous 401; SWS identity assumed by policy not re-probed with bearer in this session.
executionNotes.risksDiscovered: ui.swqt.net remains unresolved on public DNS from audit host; gateway upstream may be private-only.

validationReferences.notes: HTTP 200; serverInfo.name=swui version=1.0.0; instructions include llms/AGENTS first-hop and separate sw MCP boundary.

resources/list=10 (~2KiB); templates/list=1 swui://components/{name}; tools/list=4 swui.*; catalog.search bounded; package.get VERSION_NOT_FOUND for 9.9.9; component.get Button/FormField/DateHelpers/cn/Theme succeed.
HTTP 401; SWS identity not re-verified without bearer token.
Public DNS still unresolved from audit host; gateway upstream routing to swui succeeds via agent.swqt.net.
Stops at authenticated /mcp initialize 401; swui path assertions not reached in shared script without SWS bearer.
8/8 prompts pass; 0 service misroutes; prompt 8 correctly refuses SWS workflow via swui; human reviewer sign-off 签收 at 2026-07-23.

blocker.reason: Production /mcp/swui swui identity and human SpotCheck signed off.
blocker.residualRisk: Optional follow-up: verify /mcp and /mcp/sws with bearer; publish ui.swqt.net public DNS if human portal must be directly reachable.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Anonymous initialize returns swui 1.0.0 with progressive-disclosure instructions.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: Pre-deploy sws 0.1.144 identity no longer observed on anonymous /mcp/swui.

gateOutcomes.evidence: 10 resources, 1 template, 4 tools; search/version/component contracts match S-0016 design.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: Byte budgets and tool names verified on production.

gateOutcomes.evidence: 8/8 prompts; 0 misroutes; human sign-off 签收 2026-07-23.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: Prompt 8 refusal of SWS workflow via swui verified.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Anonymous /mcp and /mcp/sws return 401 without swui leakage; bearer identity not re-run.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Ops may optionally confirm SWS identity with token.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: Negative unknown paths do not reach swui handler.

items.projectCompanionFactDecision: ssot-update-required and applied: project-swqt-companion outside-in observation updated post-deploy.

reviewDecision.reason: swui production entry and human SpotCheck gates satisfied; residual DNS/SWS bearer checks documented as partial not blocking.

promotionDisposition.promotionRevisitTrigger: Reopen if /mcp/swui regresses to SWS, resources/list exceeds budget, or SpotCheck rubric fails on fresh Agent sessions.
promotionDisposition.closureIntegrityCheck: Human sign-off recorded; no fabricated production claims for ui.swqt.net public DNS.

items.validationSummary: delivered: production /mcp/swui swui 1.0.0; 8/8 SpotCheck with human sign-off; partial SWS bearer + ui.swqt.net DNS
items.rootMount: Yes - layout v3 stable Step path; no physical archive move.
items.hardPromotionGateSummary: minimum auto-filled by workflow promote; validationSummary provided.
items.testCaseSummary: delivered: production /mcp/swui swui 1.0.0; 8/8 SpotCheck with human sign-off; partial SWS bearer + ui.swqt.net DNS

items.minimumSetSatisfied: Yes - workflow promote populated minimum registry/audit records before setting status=delivered.

requirementAudit.requirement: reviewed Step can be delivered only with closure records.
requirementAudit.evidence: workflow promote populated delivered-registry-entry and completion-audit before status=delivered.
requirementAudit.risk: Minimum auto-fill is less descriptive than a hand-authored Completion Audit.
requirementAudit.followUp: Review owner may enrich the audit before delivery when richer evidence is required.

items.intermediateDocumentStateAudit: delivered-registry-entry and completion-audit populated before final status=delivered.

closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditEvidence: Closing triad minimum: reviewed precondition satisfied; validationSummary present; registry/audit records populated before status=delivered.

validationSummary: delivered: production /mcp/swui swui 1.0.0; 8/8 SpotCheck with human sign-off; partial SWS bearer + ui.swqt.net DNS
